assertions.assertion: Output must mention CI run time of 47 minutes
assertions.evidence: “Jenkins full build is 47 minutes” and “Jenkins 47 minutes” are explicitly stated.

assertions.assertion: Output must address flaky tests specifically (not just 'tests exist')
assertions.evidence: It says “around 30% are flaky and frequently ignored” and calls this an “Untrusted quality signal.”

assertions.assertion: Output must give at least one short-term action item
assertions.evidence: Short-term items include “Stabilize flaky tests…” and action IDs A12/A13/A14/A15 with horizon “⚡ short”.

assertions.assertion: Output must score CI/CD at 2/5 or lower
assertions.evidence: Area scores table lists CI/CD as “1/5” (also Delta shows current CI/CD = 1/5).

assertions.assertion: Output must not recommend replacing Jenkins without acknowledging migration cost
assertions.evidence: It mentions migration with explicit cost/risk: “requires 8–12 weeks of parallel pipelines and CI team overlap risk.”

summary: All assertions are explicitly satisfied (5/5 pass).
